summary: Derived State Vendor/PO Fix testing completed. All 8 unit tests passed. Fixed a bug in derived_state_service.py where bc_record_info could be None (not just missing), causing AttributeError. Backend API and Frontend UI verified - derived state correctly shows no 'Vendor not matched' blocking issues when vendor IS matched, and PO override message displays correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in derived_state_service.py line 451: bc_val.get('bc_record_info', {}) returns None when bc_record_info is explicitly set to None. Changed to: bc_record_info = bc_val.get('bc_record_info') or {}

success_rate.frontend: 100% (UI verified - derived state card shows correct state)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Derived state vendor/PO fix fully tested. Key verifications: (1) Unit tests for vendor blocking issue cleanup - 8/8 PASS, (2) API GET /api/documents/{doc_id} returns derived_state with no stale vendor blocks - PASS, (3) POST /api/ap-review/documents/{doc_id}/override-po sets manual_po_override and clears PO blocks - PASS, (4) Frontend Document Status card shows validation=pass, no Blocking Issues section, 'PO check overridden by reviewer' message - PASS. Fixed a minor bug where bc_record_info being None (not missing) caused AttributeError.
